title: 目標達成の後に・挑めカワイイの冠

text_block_list.name: Curren Chan
text_block_list.text:
Let the Curren Chan Special Holiday ★ Meet and
Greet begin!

text_block_list.name: Curren Fans
text_block_list.text:
Kyaaa!
Curren!
It all started a few hours earlier...

text_block_list.name: Curren Chan
text_block_list.text:
Yep! You know how I was just nominated for
Umastagram's "Trendsetter of the Year"?

I do remember her posting about that.
Apparently, there's an award for becoming a hot
trend on Umastagram each year.

text_block_list.name: Curren Chan
text_block_list.text:
I wanna celebrate that and thank my fans for all
their support directly!

text_block_list.name: Curren Chan
text_block_list.text:
I mean, if they weren't following me, I wouldn't
have been nominated, right?

Since she cares so much about her fans, this might
be a good chance for her to enjoy herself. Just as
I try to ask about how she'd like to hold it...

text_block_list.name: Curren Chan
text_block_list.text:
Okay, let's get going! A lot of fans are already
lined up.

text_block_list.name: Curren Chan
text_block_list.text:
Okay, let's get going! A lot of fans are already
lined up.

text_block_list.name: Curren Chan
text_block_list.text: We're going to open up the cafeteria early, so I'd be awfully grateful if you could help me out a bit!

text_block_list.name: Curren Chan
text_block_list.text: Yep!
choice_data_list:
But don't you have to get permission from the
academy?

text_block_list.name: Curren Chan
text_block_list.text:
Already did! I got permission and made all the
necessary arrangements, including reserving the
cafeteria and posting the announcement!

text_block_list.name: Curren Chan
text_block_list.text:
I posted a short on Umastagram and everything...
You didn't even see it, did you?

text_block_list.name: Curren Chan
text_block_list.text:
I posted a short on Umastagram and everything...
You didn't even see it, did you?

I totally missed it. Guilt starts to seep in for not
helping her out at all, when...

text_block_list.name: Curren Chan
text_block_list.text: ...Hehe.

text_block_list.name: Curren Chan
text_block_list.text: Actually, I've got an important job for you.

text_block_list.name: Curren Chan
text_block_list.text: Actually, I've got an important job for you.

text_block_list.name: Curren Chan
text_block_list.text:
Aaand that iiis... not taking your eyes off me!
Think you can handle that? ♪

text_block_list.name: Curren Chan
text_block_list.text:
Aaand that iiis... not taking your eyes off me!
Think you can handle that? ♪

And so, the fan meeting begins. Just as she
asked, I don't take my eyes off of her the entire
time she's interacting with all her fans.

text_block_list.name: Curren Fan A
text_block_list.text: U-um! C-congratulations on your n-nomination!

text_block_list.name: Curren Chan
text_block_list.text: Thanks. ♪ I couldn't have done it without you!

text_block_list.name: Curren Fan A
text_block_list.text:
You're so unbelievably cute in real life! Like so,
sooo cute!

text_block_list.name: Curren Fan B
text_block_list.text:
We just became fans recently... We love watching
races and can't wait to see your next one! We'll
be cheering for you!

text_block_list.name: Curren Chan
text_block_list.text:
Thank you! ♪ As long as I have your support, I
can run forever. ♪

text_block_list.name: Curren Fans
text_block_list.text: So cuuute! We'll follow you anywhere!

Perhaps due to her self-promotion efforts, Curren
Chan has picked up some new fans. WIth this, it
looks like we can consider her goal of raising her
profile accomplished.

text_block_list.name: Curren Chan
text_block_list.text: Thanks, everyone! Bye for now!

text_block_list.name: Curren Fans
text_block_list.text:
Kyaaaa!
Bye, Curren!

text_block_list.name: Curren Chan
text_block_list.text:
...Phew. I think that's the last of them. I'm so glad
I got to talk to everyone. ♪

text_block_list.name: Curren Chan
text_block_list.text: Now, let's get to cleaning...

text_block_list.name: Curren Fan A
text_block_list.text:
Oh... Hey. Isn't that the runner who won the
Japanese Oaks this year?

text_block_list.name: Curren Fan B
text_block_list.text: Huh? Oh! Y-you're right! It is!

text_block_list.name: Curren Fan A
text_block_list.text:
Um! I've seen all of your races! Your running has
really moved me!

text_block_list.name: Oaks Umamusume
text_block_list.text: Huh? Oh... Thank you!

text_block_list.name: Curren Fan B
text_block_list.text: It's too bad about the Triple Tiara... But you were so strong and so... so... Sniff!

text_block_list.name: Curren Fan B
text_block_list.text:
SO COOL! I never thought I'd get to meet you in
real life!

text_block_list.name: Oaks Umamusume
text_block_list.text:
...Thank you. I plan on running in the Arima Kinen
too, so I hope you'll cheer for me there!

text_block_list.name: Curren Fans
text_block_list.text:
Of course! We can't wait to see you in another big
race!

text_block_list.name: Curren Chan
text_block_list.text: ...It really is all about the races.

text_block_list.name: Curren Chan
text_block_list.text:
There's so much power in the races... It's honestly
amazing. I think I have an inkling of how those
fans feel.

text_block_list.name: Curren Chan
text_block_list.text:
You can't help but be dazzled by the radiance of
athletes like that.

text_block_list.name: Curren Chan
text_block_list.text: ...Hey, Big Bro?

text_block_list.name: Curren Chan
text_block_list.text: ...Hey, Big Sis?

text_block_list.name: Curren Chan
text_block_list.text: I think... I really do want the Triple Tiara.

text_block_list.name: Curren Chan
text_block_list.text:
...I think it's time to see if I have what it takes to
compete in the Tiara.

She looks at me quite seriously. Even with all the
training we've done so far, the Triple Tiara might
be a bit of a stretch. But...

If she's serious about going for it, as her trainer, I
have to support her to the end!

text_block_list.name: Curren Chan
text_block_list.text: ...Thanks for backing my decision.

text_block_list.name: Curren Chan
text_block_list.text:
The first race, the Oka Sho, is 1,600 meters,
right? But since I'm best at 1,200-meter races...
choice_data_list: We should start with a 1,400-meter race.
We should start with a 1,400-meter race.

text_block_list.name: Curren Chan
text_block_list.text: Agreed!
choice_data_list: Let's go to the Fillies' Revue.

text_block_list.text:
If she does well in that race, she'll be one step
closer to her dream of holding the Triple Tiara!
choice_data_list: But if things start to get too hard for you...

text_block_list.name: Curren Chan
text_block_list.text:
I know. You can keep as close an eye on me as
you want, okay?

text_block_list.name: Curren Chan
text_block_list.text:
I know. You can keep as close an eye on me as
you want, okay?

text_block_list.name: Curren Chan
text_block_list.text:
But I don't think it'll be too much. I'll definitely
show you I can do it!

And so, we decide on the Fillies' Revue for her
next goal!
